title: ollama extension: Gemini 3 thinking models fail with 400 "missing thought_signature" in tool calls
summary:
## Summary

The bundled `ollama` extension at `~/.gsd/agent/extensions/ollama/ollama-chat-provider.js` only handles `<think>...</think>` inline thinking format. It does not propagate Gemini 3's structured `thoughtSignature` field, so the first tool call against any Gemini 3 cloud model returns HTTP

Today, mint is tightly coupled to Anthropic Claude. The model (`claude-4-sonnet-20241022`) is hardcoded in `lib/prompts.mjs:6`, and every call goes through `callAnthropic()` (`lib/prompts.mjs:307-331`), which does a direct fetch to the Ant

title: Bug: `max_tokens` from config.yaml is silently ignored — never propagated to AIAgent, causing output truncation on Ollama Cloud / zai / custom endpoints
summary:
## Summary

The `max_tokens` option documented in `cli-config.yaml.example` is never read from user config or propagated to `AIAgent.__init__()`. As a result, on providers without a hardcoded default in `ChatCompletionsTransport.build_kwargs()` (e.g. Ollama Cloud, zai, custom OpenAI-compatible endpo
